description: An outdoor photograph of a man. The subject is a middle-aged bald man with a slight build, frowning at the camera, wearing a black sleeveless athletic tank top with a blue and teal trim collar. He has small tattoos on his left upper arm/bicep. He stands on a sandy/gravel roadside; behind him are a chain-link fence, dry desert brush, scattered trees and tall cypress, a streetlight, suburban houses, and parked cars (a red sedan and a dark SUV) under a blue sky with clouds, consistent with a Phoenix/Arizona setting (per the tweet, ERO Phoenix). There is no overlaid text, headline, slogan, agency seal, or graphic design on the image.
